basics.name: Rosheen Rejeesh
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software engineer fresh graduate with hands-on experience developing responsive web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, Vue.js, Python, and Django. Experienced in frontend development, API integration, bug fixing, and database-driven applications through internships and academic projects. Strong foundation in Git-based workflows, Agile development practices, and building scalable software solutions.

work.summary: Assigned to SEEd.Lab (PETRONAS–TCS social enterprise innovation hub).
highlights: Collaborated with social enterprises to develop automation tools and resolve software bugs.
Converted raw data into user-friendly PDF reports to improve business operations.
Researched and implemented Facebook Messenger chatbots and WordPress livestream plugins.
Developed secure login and signup functionality.
Implemented custom password validation on Wix signup pages.
Collaborated with the CEO, product managers, designers, and engineers to deliver software solutions.
Developed responsive frontend interfaces using React.js.
Implemented backend services, REST APIs, and databases using Python and Django.

projects.name: Humanizing AI
projects.description: Developed a testing platform to evaluate the human-like quality of LLM-generated movie reviews using AI detection tools such as ZeroGPT and GPTZero.
highlights: Compared prompting strategies.
Evaluated AI-generated content authenticity.
Collaborated in an Agile development team.

projects.name: Hearty Meal
projects.description: Developed a responsive web application providing personalized dietary recommendations for individuals with chronic diseases.
highlights: Built frontend using Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and Tailwind CSS.
Developed backend using Next.js.
Implemented dietary information management features.

projects.name: Women In Tech
projects.description: Developed a digital platform helping elderly women in Malaysia and Thailand connect with their communities.
highlights: Developed responsive frontend features using React.js.
Implemented Firebase database functionality.
Improved accessibility and user engagement.

projects.name: Project Management Software
projects.description: Developed a full-stack project management web application for startup teams.
highlights: Implemented task management and sprint boards.
Built frontend using HTML and CSS.
Developed backend using Flask and Python.
